name: A1 Mobile Transport
recent_news: No web presence found; not listed in Oshkosh Area School District transportation vendors (district uses Kobussen Buses Ltd). Likely micro NEMT/mobility operator rather than school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Very small (4 employees, ~$438K revenue) Oshkosh-based operator with no confirmed school-bus contracts. Below Summit's tuck-in scale threshold; pass unless adjacent to a larger WI consolidation play.

name: J & N Transit Corp
recent_news: No web presence found; residential-zoned address on N Solar Ave in Mequon suggests a single-operator NEMT/private van service rather than a school-bus contractor. Mequon-Thiensville SD area is largely served by larger providers (Lamers, Riteway).
fit_notes: Micro operator (~7 employees, ~$421K revenue) with no confirmed school-district business. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target on current evidence.

name: Allied Medical Svc
principals: John L. Forrest Jr. (former owner/president, deceased 2006)
recent_news: John L. Forrest Jr., owner/president from 1986, died 2006; he also founded Allied Wheelchair Service in 2000. Status of original Allied Medical Services entity unclear in 2025/2026; Lewiston NEMT market today is dominated by United Ambulance/United Wheelchair, RideSource, Alliance Family Transportation, and Western Maine Transportation Services.
fit_notes: NEMT/wheelchair operator, not a school-bus contractor. Founder deceased 20 years ago; entity may be dormant. Not a Summit tuck-in fit (wrong service mix and likely inactive).

name: Annie's Transportation Inc
recent_news: No website. A separately-named 'Annie Transportation LLC' on FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 3751675) is based in Center Point, AL with 1 power unit / 2 drivers — likely NOT the Milwaukee entity. The Milwaukee Annie's Transportation Inc has no confirmed school-district contracts; MPS uses Lakeside, GO Riteway, HopSkipDrive, and other major contractors.
fit_notes: Owner-operator scale (6 employees, ~$414K revenue) on Milwaukee's north side. Too small to move the needle as a tuck-in; pass unless bundled with other MPS-area minority-owned vendors.

name: Big Tao Transport
recent_news: Yelp lists Big Tao Transport at 4912 W Villard Ave, Milwaukee. Jan 16, 2026 Milwaukee police executed a search warrant at a property near 49th & Villard owned by 'Big Tao and Associates' in a weapons investigation; the owner publicly stated they 'do not operate a business there' and rent the property out — strong indication the address is not an active operating depot for school transportation.
fit_notes: Likely inactive/non-operating at the listed address per owner's own statement; possible reputational risk flagged by recent police activity. Not a Summit tuck-in target — disqualify.
